title: An AI Engineer's Intro to Vibe Coding with Cursor, uv, Claude 3.7 sonnet
author: Gregloughnane
text:
Looking to get started with Cursor and catch the vibezzzz?
The latest in AI buzzword compliance is Vibe Coding, and an interactive dev env stack for doing it has become a best practice in courses and our discord community.
Here’s what we built, shipped, and shared yesterday! Hope it helps you out if you’re looking to get up and running as an AI Engineer!
–
Build an Existential Snake app, soup to nuts with Cursor, uv, and Claude 3.7 Sonnet!
GitHub Repo: GitHub - AI-Maker-Space/Vibe-Coding-With-Cursor: Feel the Vibes
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/live/RNIFvvvETM4?si=05t1Mw1GfsmTjVFv
–
What cool apps have you vibe-coded with Cursor and Claude 3.7 Sonnet?
